ul.li: Complexity: $O(\ln(N))$ layer visits + $O(efSearch \cdot M)$ base comparisons.
SIMD Optimization: Distance metrics must use _mm256_loadu_ps and _mm256_sub_ps.
Memory Safety: VectorStorage utilizes mmap(MAP_SHARED) with read-only protection during search.
Locking Strategy: AngelRwLock uses a 32-bit atomic state for shared/exclusive tracking.

g.text: IF d_nb < results.max() OR results.len() < ef
search(query: *const f32, k: u32, ef: u32)
